ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the county */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the county */,
  "major_cities" TEXT /* Major cities in the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "county_website" TEXT /* Website of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school district */,
  "district_type" INTEGER /* Type of the district (e.g., public, private) */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the district */,
  "total_teachers" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers in the district */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Student-to-teacher ratio in the district */,
  "district_website" TEXT /* Website of the district */,
  "district_email" TEXT /* Email address of the district */,
  "district_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the district */,
  "district_address" TEXT /* Address of the district office */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Primary funding source for the district (e.g., state, federal, local) */,
  "charter_status" TEXT /* Whether the district is a charter district */,
  "magnet_schools" INTEGER /* Number of magnet schools in the district */,
  "special_education_programs" INTEGER /* Number of special education programs in the district */,
  "english_learner_programs" INTEGER /* Number of English learner programs in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the school belongs to */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school */,
  "total_teachers" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers in the school */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Student-to-teacher ratio in the school */,
  "school_website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  "school_email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "school_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "school_funding" REAL /* Total funding received by the school */,
  "school_funding_source" TEXT /* Primary funding source for the school (e.g., state, federal, local) */,
  "charter_status" TEXT /* Whether the school is a charter school */,
  "magnet_status" TEXT /* Whether the school is a magnet school */,
  "special_education_programs" INTEGER /* Number of special education programs in the school */,
  "english_learner_programs" INTEGER /* Number of English learner programs in the school */,
  "extracurricular_activities" INTEGER /* Number of extracurricular activities offered by the school */,
  "sports_programs" INTEGER /* Number of sports programs offered by the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_number FOREIGN KEY ("district_number") REFERENCES districts ("district_number")
)
